2606.13216.title: Layer-Resolved Optimal Transport for Hallucination Detection in NMT and Abstractive Summarization
2606.13216.paper_summary: Optimal transport (OT) has been shown to detect hallucinations in neural machine translation (NMT) by measuring the geometric distance between cross-attention distributions and a reference distribution, without any supervision. We extend this analysis to all six decoder layers of the Fairseq DE-EN model ($N=3{,}414$), showing that Wass-to-Unif and Wass-to-Data are complementary detectors specialised across hallucination types, that detection is concentrated in layers L1--L4 with L5 anti-predictive for subtler types, and that hallucinated translations lack the exploratory attention phase present in correct translations from the first decoding step. We further evaluate whether the geometric signal transfers to abstractive summarization faithfulness detection: our unsupervised OT detector on AggreFact ($N=1{,}116$) achieves $57.2\%$/$57.6\%$ balanced accuracy on CNN/XSum -- above chance but substantially below supervised MiniCheck-Flan-T5-L($69.9\%$/$74.3\%$). This gap is principled: unlike NMT hallucinations, unfaithful summaries can attend correctly to source tokens while misrepresenting their content, a failure mode invisible to concentration-based OT metrics by construction. Structural experiments on T5-base confirm consistent decoder organisation across depth, with Layer~3 showing peak concentration and Layer~12 being most critical for generation quality. Together, the results establish OT on cross-attention as a reliable detector when the failure mode is source disengagement, a principled interpretability tool regardless of task, and fundamentally limited when faithfulness failures occur downstream of attention.
2606.13216.paper_summary_zh: 最佳運輸（OT）已被證明能夠通過測量交叉注意分佈與參考分佈之間的幾何距離來檢測神經機器翻譯（NMT）中的幻覺，而無需任何監督。<lb/>我們將這一分析擴展到 Fairseq DE-EN 模型的所有六個解碼器層（$N=3{,}414$），顯示 Wass-to-Unif 和 Wass-to-Data 是專門針對幻覺類型的互補檢測器，檢測集中在 L1--L4 層，而 L5 層對於更微妙的類型則是反預測的，並且幻覺翻譯缺乏正確翻譯在第一次解碼步驟中存在的探索性注意階段。<lb/>我們進一步評估幾何信號是否轉移到抽象摘要的忠實性檢測：我們在 AggreFact 上的無監督 OT 檢測器（$N=1{,}116$）在 CNN/XSum 上達到 $57.2\%$/$57.6\%$ 的平衡準確率——高於隨機機率，但顯著低於監督的 MiniCheck-Flan-T5-L（$69.9\%$/$74.3\%$）。<lb/>這一差距是有原則的：與 NMT 幻覺不同，不忠實摘要可以正確地關注源標記，同時扭曲其內容，這是一種基於集中度的 OT 指標在結構上無法察覺的失敗模式。<lb/>對 T5-base 的結構實驗確認了跨深度的一致解碼器組織，其中第 3 層顯示出峰值集中，而第 12 層對生成質量最為關鍵。<lb/>綜合來看，這些結果確立了在源脫離的失敗模式下，交叉注意的 OT 作為可靠檢測器的地位，無論任務如何都是一種有原則的可解釋性工具，並且在忠實性失敗發生在注意力之後時根本受到限制。
2606.13216.author: Mariia Onyshchuk et.al.
2606.13216.authors: Mariia Onyshchuk, Maksym-Vasyl Tarnavskyi, Marta Sumyk
